plugins.name: pakistan-regs
plugins.description: Pakistan lender regulatory knowledge base (SBP, SECP, FMU, NADRA, MoITT, PTA) — 115 regulations, 39 concepts, 20 entities, 3,217 chunks with page-accurate citations. Adds /reg-search, /reg-validate, /reg-cite slash commands and three skills for digital-lending compliance.
